subject: [APPC] Update chart with service account
commit_message:
[APPC] Update chart with service account

Add service account to requirements, values and deployment/statefulset

Issue-ID: OOM-2843
Signed-off-by: farida azmy <farida.azmy.ext@orange.com>

well it fails for an unknown reason IMHO (seems to be related to appc but not sure)

two options here:
1. abandon and we'll see if one day APPC is going back
2. merge this as it won't hurt

I tend to favor option 1

Abandoned

APPC is removed
